narrative_text: Deep beneath the sparkling waves, a curious young sea turtle named Pip has found something glowing inside a giant, pearly clam. What could be hidden inside, and where will this underwater adventure lead?
branch_summary: Dive into a glowing coral reef to help a brave sea turtle uncover a sunken treasure.
scene_description: A vibrant, sun-drenched coral reef at midday, where beams of light pierce through crystalline turquoise water to illuminate the sandy floor. The mood is wonder-filled and serene, featuring a palette of neon pinks, electric blues, and soft golds. The composition focuses on a central sandy clearing surrounded by towering coral structures.
background_description: A sunlit seafloor with fine, rippled white sand and a distant silhouette of a deep-sea trench under a bright turquoise water surface with shimmering light rays.

properties.color: emerald green shell with golden-yellow star patterns and a pale cream underbelly
properties.size: medium character, roughly the size of a large dinner plate
properties.texture: smooth, polished shell with leathery, dappled skin on the flippers
properties.pattern: intricate geometric hexagons on the shell with small amber spots on the neck
properties.distinctive_features: wearing a small, weathered leather aviator cap with tiny brass goggles perched on the forehead

entities.pose: swimming mid-water, flippers extended to the sides for balance, head tilted forward with wide eyes looking down

properties.color: iridescent violet outer shell with a glowing, neon-cyan interior
properties.texture: rough, ridged exterior with a slimy, glowing, silk-like mantle inside
properties.pattern: heavy vertical ridges on the outside, swirling marbled colors on the inside
properties.distinctive_features: a single, perfectly round pearl the size of a grapefruit sitting in the center, emitting a soft pulsing white light

entities.pose: resting on the sand with the top shell hinge wide open at a forty-five degree angle

properties.color: bright magenta with deep plum-colored grooves
properties.texture: hard, stony surface with labyrinthine ridges
properties.pattern: complex, winding maze-like channels across the entire dome
properties.distinctive_features: small clusters of glowing yellow sea-anemones sprouting from the side

entities.pose: fixed, rounded dome shape sitting firmly on the seabed

properties.color: translucent olive green with amber-tinted edges
properties.pattern: long, flowing ribbon-like leaves with small air bladders at the base of each leaf
properties.distinctive_features: swaying gently in an unseen current, reaching toward the surface

entities.pose: stretching vertically from the bottom to the top of the frame with a slight S-curve
